rag_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex; otherwise remove the guarantee.
Align the helper declaration type with the expression.
Use AGREE scalar declaration types int, real, and bool.
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in component type contracts.
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {**... **}; blocks.
Use eq helpers to declare boolean expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies.
